title: Bitcoin Surges Past $67K on ETF Inflows
body: Bitcoin rallied above $67,000 as spot ETF inflows reached record levels. Institutional demand continues to grow with major asset managers increasing their BTC allocations. Analysts expect continued upward momentum if inflows persist.

title: Ethereum Upgrade Boosts Network Throughput
body: The latest Ethereum network upgrade has significantly improved transaction throughput and reduced gas fees. Developers report a 40% improvement in processing speed, making ETH more competitive for DeFi applications.

title: Indian Markets Hit All-Time Highs
body: NIFTY and SENSEX reached new record levels driven by strong quarterly earnings and foreign institutional buying. IT and banking sectors led the rally with double-digit gains.

title: Solana DeFi TVL Crosses $5 Billion
body: Total Value Locked in Solana DeFi protocols has surpassed $5 billion, marking a significant milestone. New lending and derivatives protocols are driving growth on the high-speed blockchain.

title: Federal Reserve Signals Rate Pause
body: The Federal Reserve indicated it may pause interest rate changes in the near term, citing balanced risks to the economic outlook. Markets reacted positively with both crypto and equity indices gaining.
